    items = sorted([(v, 0) for v in a] + [(v, 1) for v in b])

    # Gaps between consecutive items
    gaps = []
    for i in range(N-1):
        gaps.append((items[i+1][0] - items[i][0], i, i+1))
    gaps.sort()
    
    parent = list(range(N))
    comp_a = [[items[i][0]] if items[i][1]==0 else [] for i in range(N)]
    comp_b = [[items[i][0]] if items[i][1]==1 else [] for i in range(N)]
    
    def find(x):
        while parent[x] != x:
            parent[x] = parent[parent[x]]
            x = parent[x]
        return x

        for i in range(min(len(sa), len(sb))):

            else: break

    current_gain = 0
    gi = 0

    # Actually compute initial per-component gains
    comp_gains = [comp_gain(comp_a[i], comp_b[i]) for i in range(N)]
    current_gain = sum(comp_gains)

            _, u, v = gaps[gi]; gi += 1
            ru, rv = find(u), find(v)
